fullArticle:
All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes.

With popular TV series, hit movies, award-winning documentaries, hilarious comedy specials, hot music programming and live sports, HBO Max is one of the best streaming services for just about everyone.

However, while it has loads of great originals, like House of the Dragon, Euphoria, The Pitt, Hacks and others, HBO Max doesn’t offer a free trial anymore.

If you’re looking to test it out before committing monthly, a subscription to DirecTV offers HBO Max and a free trial for new subscribers.

DirecTV is offering a five-day free trial for new subscribers.
